metadata.description: Source documents for pragma-stratified fact extraction
metadata.selection_rationale: NYT News articles are long (2000-11000 chars), factually dense, and cover diverse topics — ideal for extracting 8-10 facts per document across all pragmatic tiers (assertion, presupposition, implicatu...
